brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer (B) with valid identification of the 6am-8am gap; only surface-level analysis — states the gap without systematically working through why each time slot is occupied; no self-monitoring, assumption-checking, or mid-analysis course correction; implicitly claims all other times are accounted for but does not verify each slot explicitly; presents conclusion without structured uncertainty or confidence framing, only mild hedging via 'only gap'; acknowledges other times are covered but does not evaluate each wrong option (A/C/D) with specific reasons; shows the key inference but omits the full derivation eliminating each alternative option, leaving partial reproducibility
